task_completion.description: Assign backend and full profiles to backend services

task_completion.description: Verify existing configurations are not modified or deleted
task_completion.visual_evidence: The service definitions still contain their original 'image:', 'ports:', and 'depends_on:' keys, showing they were not accidentally overwritten or deleted during the profile additions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file: /home/ga/ecommerce-platform/docker-compose.yml. Base services ('postgres', 'redis') must have NO profiles defined. Services 'nginx' and 'storefront' must include both 'frontend' and 'full' profiles. Services 'api' and 'worker' must include both 'backend' and 'full' profiles. Services 'test-runner' and 'prometheus' must include both 'debug' and 'full' profiles. Existing ports, images, and depends_on must remain unchanged.
